confirm.pick: Do you confirm you choose {{team}}? You won't be able to choose {{team}} again until the end of the tournament.

countdown.timeLeft: left to lock in your {{roundLabel}} pick — make your move!

myPool.buyInText: Request to join this pool. Pay the admin to confirm your entry. You'll be approved once payment is received.
myPool.eliminatedLost: You were eliminated from "{{poolName}}". Your picked team lost in a previous round.
myPool.eliminatedNoPick: You were eliminated from "{{poolName}}" because you did not pick a team in a previous round. You must pick a team every round.
myPool.emptyPools: No pools at the moment. Check back later or create one from the admin panel.
myPool.heroText: Join a pool and make your picks. Never pick the same team twice. Survive or be eliminated.
myPool.notApproved: You must join and be approved to view {{poolName}}.
myPool.title: My Pool

pickTeam.mustPick: You must pick a team this round. If you don't pick before results are recorded, you will be eliminated.
pickTeam.noActiveRound: No active round. Check back when the next round opens for picks.
pickTeam.noMatches: No matches in this round yet.
pickTeam.picksLocked: Picks are locked for this round.

stats.allPicksSubtitle: Complete list of all picks for this round
stats.eliminatedBanner: You were eliminated from this pool.
stats.eliminatedBannerSub: You can still view stats below.
stats.noPoolText: You need to join a pool to view statistics.
stats.selectRoundPrompt: Please select a round to view statistics.
stats.subtitle: See what the community is picking, who survived, and the most popular choices each round.
stats.title: Pool

userPool.eliminatedGeneric: You were eliminated in this pool. Your picked team lost in a previous round.
userPool.eliminatedNoPick: You were eliminated because you did not pick a team in a previous round. You must pick a team every round.
userPool.eliminatedRound: You were eliminated in Round {{round}} because {{team}} lost.
userPool.loadFailed: Failed to load pool. Please try again.
userPool.subtitle: Survivor Pool
